DISCOVERY 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITION OF BARBARA MAURITZ AND MOTION FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS - MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITION OF BARBARA MURITZ IS GRANTED. THIS WILL TAKE PLACE ON SEPTEMBER 20, 2010 AND TO CONTINUE DAY TO DAY UNTIL IT IS COMPLETED. THE COURT DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS INCLUDING THE DETERMINATION OF MEDICAL EXCUSE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE : PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED.
